title: dendrobium subteres
intro: Dendrobium subteres is a type of orchid native to China, belonging to the Dendrobium genus of flowering plants. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendrobium subteres are attributed to its ability to protect against liver damage, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Dendrobium subteres can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, capsules, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
